highlights: Played a key role in the migration from monolith to microservices/microfrontends with Next.js and GraphQL, improving deployment frequency by 40%.
Improved business outcomes through checkout optimization (+15% conversion) and Adyen migration (+5% transaction success).
Built key e-learning features, including a 360 feedback tool and interactive video player, for 10,000+ active users.
Delivered responsive, accessible React interfaces with a 98% Lighthouse accessibility score.
Built core SaaS modules for construction management, including authentication, multi-tenancy, and role-based access for 50+ enterprise clients.
Implemented timesheets and automated reporting, reducing manual work by 10+ hours per week.
Built a full-stack e-commerce platform for on-demand delivery with a Ruby on Rails API and customer-facing frontend.
Implemented real-time order tracking, inventory management, and secure payment integrations.
